name: Player Block Placement
desc: Player places a block or uses an item. Can also be used for empty-hand interactions (e.g., pressing buttons).

fields.name: position
fields.desc: Position where the block/item is used

fields.name: placedBlockDirection
fields.desc: Face of the target block (0-5). 255 if no block face targeted.

fields.name: facingX/Y/Z
fields.desc: Cursor position on block face (0-1). Present when direction != 255.

modules.name: Scaffold
modules.purpose: Scaffold places blocks silently. Autoblock sends invalid placement (pos=-1,-1,-1, face=255) to start blocking. NoSlow sends C08 with current item to bypass use-item slowdown.

modules.name: KillAura (Autoblock)
modules.purpose: Scaffold places blocks silently. Autoblock sends invalid placement (pos=-1,-1,-1, face=255) to start blocking. NoSlow sends C08 with current item to bypass use-item slowdown.

modules.name: NoSlowdown
modules.purpose: Scaffold places blocks silently. Autoblock sends invalid placement (pos=-1,-1,-1, face=255) to start blocking. NoSlow sends C08 with current item to bypass use-item slowdown.

modules.name: FastUse
modules.purpose: Scaffold places blocks silently. Autoblock sends invalid placement (pos=-1,-1,-1, face=255) to start blocking. NoSlow sends C08 with current item to bypass use-item slowdown.
